content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Beautiful Subarrays". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/665/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the size of the array. The second line contains n integers, the elements of the array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a hashmap to store the frequency of the prefix sum modulo 2, then calculate the number of beautiful subarrays.
